chunks.subject: A bull moose with large antlers
chunks.action: A large bull moose walks from right to left across a sagebrush flat. Another moose is partially visible walking alongside it. The moose walks out of frame, with a hazy mountain range visible in the distant background.

setting.location: A sagebrush flat in Grand Teton National Park

chunks.audio_character: Sync sound of the moose walking through brush and ambient nature sounds.
chunks.editorial_notes: This is high-quality wildlife B-roll, perfect for establishing the setting of Grand Teton National Park. It can be used as a transitional scene or under narration about the wildness and beauty of the area.

key_moments.description: The bull moose is centered in the frame, walking steadily across the plain with mountains in the background.
The moose begins to exit the left side of the frame.
